case_title: CALIFORNIA CASUALTY FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY vs. ESPINOZA, GLENDA et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CASUALTY FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED DEC-06-1994, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, ALEJANDRA
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS & COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CASUALTY FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED DEC-22-1994, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, IVAN
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT VASQUEZ, ALEJANDRA
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CASUALTY FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, GLENDA ESPINOZA, IVAN $1,215.66 PRINCIPAL, $212.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,428.16, TO BE PAID IN INSTALLMENTS OF $60.00 PER MONTH BEGINNING 1/10/95 AND ON THE TENTH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER TILL FULLY PAID. PLTF. SHALL TAKE NO ACTION TO SUSPEND DEFT'S DRIVING PRIVILEGES OR TO CAUSE EXECUTION TO ISSUE IF INSTALLMENTS ARE PAID TIMELY. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CASUALTY FIRE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, GLENDA ESPINOZA, IVAN
